page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type integrates two NVIDIA V100 graphics processing units, delivering a combined total of 32 GB of VRAM. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. Network connectivity is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the inclusion of dual dedicated GPUs alongside 16 physical cores positions this instance in a specialized hardware class. The absence of local storage and the moderate 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth represent design tradeoffs, shifting the cost profile toward compute and GPU acceleration rather than high-speed local I/O or massive network throughput.

The hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities, such as deep learning training, machine learning inference, high-performance computing, and GPU-accelerated data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor, designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. It features 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of two NVIDIA V100 GPUs with a combined 32 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. The lack of local storage and moderate network speed represent key architectural tradeoffs. This server is configured for parallel computing tasks, including machine learning model training, inference, and GPU-driven data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.4xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 16 Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA V100 GPUs with 32 GB VRAM, designed for GPU-accelerated computing without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.4xlarge features 16 Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel computing workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-GPU server featuring sixteen physical Intel Xeon cores and thirty-two gigabytes of total video memory for parallel processing.

Two integrated NVIDIA V100 GPUs with 32 GB total VRAM
64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage options
